cafH2.description: Heading for the Call All Friends in-game panel

cafDescription.message: Call all your friends that have a phone.

cafStatusIgnored.description: Status prefix when some friends are excluded

miH2.description: Heading for the Mass Interact in-game panel

miDescription.message: Perform interactions with characters present in this locale.
miDescription.description: Description text in the Mass Interact in-game panel

miButton.description: Submit button label for the Mass Interact feature

miStatusCheckingRelations.message: Ignore new acquaintances is enabled, checking relations URL...
miStatusCheckingRelations.description: Status when loading the relations page to filter acquaintances

miStatusAnalyzingRelations.message: Analyzing relations page $PAGE$ to get current acquaintances...
miStatusAnalyzingRelations.description: Status while parsing each page of the relations list

miStatusSkippingAcquaintance.message: Skipping $NAME$ as new acquaintances are not allowed...
miStatusSkippingAcquaintance.description: Status when a character is skipped because they are a new acquaintance

miStatusSkippingExcluded.message: Skipping $NAME$ as the ID is in the ignore list...
miStatusSkippingExcluded.description: Status when a character is skipped because their ID is in the exclusion list

miStatusTotalSkipped.message: Ignored a total of $TOTAL$ present characters.

miStatusNewAcqSkip.description: Appended to the skipped summary for new acquaintances

miStatusIgnoreSkip.description: Appended to the skipped summary for explicitly ignored characters

miStatusCheckingChar.description: Status while checking interaction options for each character

miStatusInteracting.message: Interacting with friend $INDEX$ out of $TOTAL$ ($NAME$). Interaction # $INTERACTION$...

miStatusFinalInteracted.message: Interacted a total of $INTERACTIONS$ with $CHARS$ characters!
miStatusFinalInteracted.description: Final summary shown after all mass interactions complete

miStatusNoInteraction.description: Status when mass interact finds no interactions to perform

ggfTitle.description: Heading for the Gotta Go Fast autograph collection panel

ggfDescription.message: The script will use all books in your inventory to collect autographs from pop stars present in the city!
ggfDescription.description: Description paragraph for the autograph collection panel

ggfDisableHint.message: To hide this panel, disable Enable autograph collection on the Options page, in the Misc Options section.
ggfDisableHint.description: Hint shown in the panel telling the user how to disable the feature via Misc Options

ggfHowToUse.description: Instructions heading for the autograph collection panel

ggfStep1.message: Configure the Autograph book item name (in your language) on the Options page, in the Misc Options section. This must match the item name as shown in your inventory.
ggfStep1.description: Step 1 instruction for autograph collection. Contains HTML. The link id must not be changed.

ggfStep2.message: Ensure you have autograph books in your inventory. Your character must be in any city (not traveling) and must not have a busy status (e.g. recording, rehearsal, date, etc.).

ggfStep3.message: Click Start to begin. The script will find famous people in the city, and the magic starts.
ggfStep3.description: Step 3 instruction for autograph collection. Contains HTML.

ggfStep4.message: Blocked chars are characters that did not accept item usage. They are stored for the current session only so they are not retried repeatedly. Use Clear blocked chars to remove them from the list and allow the script to try them again in the same session.
ggfStep4.description: Step 4 instruction for autograph collection. Contains HTML.

ggfClearBlockedChars.description: Button label to clear the blocked characters list

ggfClearBlockedCharsTitle.message: Clear characters that don't accept item usage from session storage
ggfClearBlockedCharsTitle.description: Title tooltip on the clear blocked chars button

ggfStart.description: Button label to start autograph collection

ggfBooksFound.description: Log message when autograph books are detected in inventory

ggfNoBooksFound.message: No autograph books found. Check if the autograph book item name is configured in the Options page.
ggfNoBooksFound.description: Warning log when no autograph books are found in inventory

ggfNoBooks.description: Disabled state label for the start button when no books exist

ggfCollecting.description: Button label while autograph collection is running

ggfWaiting.description: Countdown timer message shown during cooldown

ggfContinuing.description: Message shown when the cooldown timer finishes

ggfMovingToLocation.description: Log entry when navigating to a character's location. Contains HTML.

ggfMaybeLeft.message: Maybe $NAME$ is no longer in the city, or something happened!
ggfMaybeLeft.description: Warning log when a character's location cannot be found

ggfErrorNavigating.description: Error log when navigation to a character fails

ggfNotAvailable.message: Apparently $NAME$ is no longer available or does not allow item usage.
ggfNotAvailable.description: Log when a character's interact page has no item-use dropdown. Contains HTML.

ggfStoringChar.message: Storing char $NAME$ ($ID$) in storage so they won't be tried again.
ggfStoringChar.description: Warning log when a character is added to the blocked list

ggfWaitingCooldown.message: Waiting for book cooldown ($MINUTES$ min remaining)...
ggfWaitingCooldown.description: Log when all books are on cooldown

ggfCollectingFrom.message: Collecting autograph from $NAME$ using book ID: $BOOKID$
ggfCollectingFrom.description: Log when using a book on a character. Contains HTML.

ggfErrorCollecting.description: Error log when autograph collection fails for a character

ggfAutographCollected.description: Success log when an autograph is successfully collected

ggfAutographCompleted.description: Info log when the autograph use completed without explicit success/error status

ggfNoEligible.message: No eligible person found. Will try again in 60 s.
ggfNoEligible.description: Warning log when the city has no eligible characters left to collect from

ggfCooldownWait.message: Cooldown of $MINUTES$ min before next use…
ggfCooldownWait.description: Log when waiting for book cooldown between characters

ggfScriptError.message: Error during script execution – check the console.
ggfScriptError.description: Generic error log for unexpected exceptions in the main loop

ggfStopped.description: Log when the user stops autograph collection

ggfBlockedCleared.description: Log when the blocked characters list is cleared

ggfLogs.description: Heading for the autograph collection log panel

remTodayIs.description: Prefix for reminder notifications indicating the current in-game date

remDay28.message: Is the Day of the Dead!

remDay40.message: Is St Kobe's Day! Investigate the Statues of Celestial Beauty in Johannesburg, Moscow, Singapore, and Tromsø to go on an adventurous quest for improved music genre skills.
remDay40.description: Reminder for in-game day 40 (St Kobe's Day)

remDay48.message: Remember to use your Halloween Horror!

remDay54.message: Remember to wear your Marvin T-Shirt to increase your star quality and get one experience point.

remThursdayCards.message: It is Thursday, remember to get your free cards!
remThursdayCards.description: Reminder shown on Thursdays for The Great Heist free card collection

remItemReady.message: Your $NAME$ is ready to be used.
remItemReady.description: Notification when an item timer has expired and the item is ready

remUseLink.description: Link text to use a ready item from the reminder notification

remDismissLink.description: Link text to dismiss a ready item notification

itTimerButtonSuffix.description: Suffix appended to item use buttons to create the Use & Timer button

itMinRegex.description: Regula expression to find minutes in timer notifications

itHourRegex.description: Regula expression to find hours in timer notifications

itDaysRegex.description: Regula expression to find days in timer notifications

itWeeksRegex.description: Regula expression to find weeks in timer notifications

iltTimerExpired.description: Prefix added to the item date/time when its timer has expired

bshBookTransport.message: Book Transport from $FROM$ to $TO$ on $DATE$ at $TIME$
bshBookTransport.description: Tooltip on the book-transport icon in the band schedule helper

misPickItemsPlaceholder.message: If you want to offer multiple items, click here and select them from the list.
misPickItemsPlaceholder.description: Closed multi-select dropdown summary on Offer Item when nothing is checked

misOneItemSelected.description: Multi-select dropdown summary when exactly one item is checked

misNItemsSelected.description: Multi-select dropdown summary when two or more items are checked

misDdHeaderAria.message: Open list of inventory items to select several for offering
misDdHeaderAria.description: Accessible name for the Offer Item multi-select dropdown toggle

misOfferNoneSelected.message: Select at least one item in the list before offering multiple.
misOfferNoneSelected.description: Validation when Offer multiple is clicked with no checkboxes selected

misOfferMultiSubmit.description: Submit button when one or more items are checked in the multi-select on Offer Item page

misOfferFormMissing.message: The page form was not found; cannot offer items.
misOfferFormMissing.description: Error when aspnetForm is missing during multi-offer on Offer Item page

misOfferGiveButtonMissing.message: The offer button was not found on the page.
misOfferGiveButtonMissing.description: Error when btnGive is missing in parsed or live DOM during multi-offer

misOfferFailed.description: Multi-offer stopped after network error, missing form, or server notification error

misOfferQueueDone.description: Summary after all queued Offer Item POSTs completed without error

misDisableHint.message: You can disable this feature in the Options page.
misDisableHint.description: Hint text to inform that the feature can be disabled in the Options page

misOfferSendingProgress.description: Progress label next to the multi-select header while queued Offer Item POSTs run

misLoadingPendingOffers.message: Checking which items are already offered…
misLoadingPendingOffers.description: Dropdown header while fetching Character/ItemsOffered before building the item list

misItemAlreadyOffered.message: This item already has an active offer and cannot be selected here.
misItemAlreadyOffered.description: Tooltip on a disabled row in the multi-select when the instance is listed on ItemsOffered

misItemOfferedHintHtml.message: This item has already been offered to someone. See $LINK$.
misItemOfferedHintHtml.description: Small hint below a disabled row in the mass-offer list; $LINK$ is replaced with an <a> tag to Character/ItemsOffered
